questions.prompt: What should the first implementation include?
questions.description: The committed spec already defines a one-page landing site. This decides how complete V1 should be.
questions.recommendedAnswer: Build a polished one-page static landing site from the spec, including responsive UI, Telegram CTA, MotoGymkhana explainer, Sunday community section, trips section, FAQ, SEO metadata, sitemap/robots, structured data, and placeholder/configurable content where real assets are not available yet.

questions.prompt: Which technical direction should we optimize for?
questions.description: The recommendation is a modern static site: fast, simple, and easy to deploy.
questions.recommendedAnswer: Use Astro with TypeScript, scoped CSS or Tailwind, static output, optimized images, minimal JavaScript, and deploy on Vercel or Cloudflare Pages.

questions.prompt: How should V1 handle Telegram, photos, and location privacy?
questions.description: The current spec recommends sharing the exact parking-lot pin only inside Telegram.
questions.recommendedAnswer: Keep the exact location private and say the pin is in Telegram. Use a configurable Telegram URL placeholder until the real invite link is provided. Use the visual concept and high-quality local-style placeholders for now, with clear image slots for real MotoBarna photos later.

questions.prompt: What language approach should V1 use?
questions.description: This affects copy, SEO metadata, and future multilingual structure.
questions.recommendedAnswer: English-first V1 with natural Barcelona search-language cues and a FAQ note that the community can mix English, Spanish, Catalan, and other languages. Add Spanish/Catalan pages later only if they can be maintained.

questions.prompt: What quality bar should the implementation meet before it is considered done?
questions.description: This turns the spec into concrete verification work.
questions.recommendedAnswer: Run build/type checks, verify responsive layout in browser screenshots, check Lighthouse-style performance/accessibility/SEO basics, confirm all CTAs point to the configured Telegram URL, and ensure visible SEO copy/schema/robots/sitemap are present.
